core_payload.content:
# Dashboard

## 1. Role
Dashboard will become the decisive command surface where the most important graph signals arrive already structured for action rather than merely displayed for inspection.

## 2. Future Dashboard Contract
The dashboard will support richer widget composition, stronger project and branch views, clearer capsule-health and swarm-status surfaces, and better prioritization cues across planning, execution, runtime health, and review pressure.

## 3. Operational Consequence
Compression quality will become visible in the cockpit itself. The user will see what matters now, what is cooling, what is blocked, and which deeper graph paths deserve attention next without drowning in equal-weight signals.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Dashboard supports To Dig Deep by guiding attention into the right depth instead of acting as a passive wall of data.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Dashboard defines the future command surface of N1Hub: richer widget composition, stronger branch and project views, clearer capsule-health and swarm activity surfaces, and more decisive prioritization so the cockpit guides action instead of merely showing information.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
